description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 15, 2026 at 12:45 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Oak Street at Franklin Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on Oak Street in the second to the left designated left turn lane as it approached a green light at the 
intersection with Franklin Street. As the Waymo AV entered the intersection with Franklin Street and initiated a left turn, a passenger car 
that was traveling in the adjacent leftmost designated left turn lane began to proceed straight as it entered the intersection with Franklin 
Street and crossed the dashed white lane line into the Waymo AV’s lane of travel. The right side of the passenger car made contact with the 
front left side of the Waymo AV.At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
